tooltip.organizeFiles: organize your files without storing actual data - only references for privacy.
tooltip.draftDescription: Temporary workspace for files before saving to a named workspace.
tooltip.benefitsDescription: Keep projects organized, switch between datasets.

dataStaysLocal.title: Your Data Stays Local
dataStaysLocal.description: All data analysis is performed locally in your browser using DuckDB-WASM. Your files and data never leave your device, ensuring complete privacy and security.
dataStaysLocal.aiModelsTitle: DataKit AI Models - Column Schema Only
dataStaysLocal.aiModelsDescription: When using DataKit AI features, we only send column headers and data types to our AI models - never your actual data. This allows AI to understand your dataset structure while keeping your sensitive information completely private.
dataStaysLocal.aiModelsExample: For example, from a CSV with customer data, we only send: ["customer_id: INTEGER", "email: VARCHAR", "purchase_amount: DECIMAL"] - the AI never sees actual customer emails or purchase amounts.

analytics.title: Our Two-Tiered Analytics System
analytics.description: We use a privacy-first approach to understand how DataKit is used and improve the experience:

basic.title: Basic Analytics (Always Active)
basic.note: This helps us understand which features are popular and fix bugs quickly.

neverCollect.title: We Never Collect
items: Your actual data or file contents
Personal information beyond what you voluntarily provide

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Services
items: PostHog: Product analytics and user feedback
Anthropic Claude: AI-powered data insights (column schemas only)
OpenAI: AI-powered data insights (column schemas only)

choices.title: Your Choices
choices.description: You can disable advanced analytics in Settings. Basic analytics remain active to ensure DataKit works properly and securely for all users.
choices.contact: Questions about privacy? Contact us at privacy@datakit.dev
